Tests the `indexOf` method of the `String` object to verify it returns the correct index.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test case that uses the `assert` function to verify the behavior of the `indexOf` method on a `String` object. It checks that calling `indexOf` with the substring `"ab"` and a starting index of `0` on the string `"abcd"` returns `0`, which indicates that the substring `"ab"` is found at the beginning of the string. This test ensures that the `indexOf` method correctly identifies the position of a substring within a string when the substring is present at the specified starting index. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of string manipulation in JavaScript.
